name: Trolamine salicylate
description: Trolamine salicylate is an organic compound which is the salt formed between triethanolamine and salicylic acid. The triethanolamine neutralizes the acidity of the salicylic acid. It is a topical analgesic used for temporary relief of minor pain associated with arthritis, simple backache, muscle strains, sprains, and bruises. Unlike other topical analgesics, trolamine salicylate has no distinguishable odor.

interactions.name: Dexketoprofen
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Trolamine salicylate is combined with Dexketoprofen.
